{
  "claims": [
    "California immigrants pay nearly $130 billion annually in state and federal taxes.",
    "88% of farmworkers in California are immigrants, amounting to 880,000 individuals, with approximately half being undocumented.",
    "Immigrants hold one-third of all tourism and hospitality jobs in California.",
    "Immigrants make up 41% of the construction workforce in California.",
    "50% of certified nursing assistants in California nursing homes are immigrants, and about 40% of child day-care workers are also immigrants.",
